3029250.name: Hyper Hadron Racing
3029250.description:
Hyper Hadron Racing is a futuristic racing game set in outer space. Choose your specialised fighter spacecraft and battle for the finish line across diverse environments, from advanced utopian colonies to the dangerous debris of destroyed planets. Each setting brings its own distinct features and threats.

The action is combat-focused as ships are equipped with offensive weapons and defensive options, and a flexible but potent power-up system ensures racing is always competitive and hyper-hazardous! Outfly, outgun, or outsmart the rest on your way to first position.

Up to 8 players can compete online in single races or tournaments, with or without AI-controlled ships to complete the grid. Or jump into the simple but powerful track editor and create your own unique space circuits to challenge friend and foe for infinite racing fun.
